items.hook: 这类体检很多时候不是不会约，而是怕这次项目没说清。
items.bridge: 体检预约里真正决定下一步的，通常是项目、人数和时间窗口。
items.next_step: Ask for checkup type, people count if relevant, and preferred time.
items.handoff_suggestion: If clear facts arrive, move to Catcher.

items.hook: 这种情况先把时间和范围锁住，会比先看一堆套餐更省心。
items.bridge: 入职、开学和年底场景通常还会牵涉报告、医生解读和时段，所以先收窄范围更重要。
items.next_step: Ask for date, checkup type, and the main booking priority.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route deadline cases toward Catcher then Dispatcher.

items.hook: 先把最担心的点讲清楚，比急着比价格更有帮助。
items.bridge: 很多资质、报告和解读问题，只有把项目和主要顾虑说出来，才能回答得更稳。
items.next_step: Ask what the main concern is and what kind of checkup this is.
items.handoff_suggestion: Trust-sensitive cases should carry a risk tag.

items.hook: 这种情况先判断排不排得上，比先看一堆价格更关键。
items.bridge: 加急体检通常要先锁时间、项目和是否愿意先做基础检查。
items.next_step: Ask which time, what checkup type, and whether a narrower urgent scope would work.

items.hook: 复检这件事很多时候不是重新选，而是先把这次要补哪一类说清。
items.bridge: 复检更看重路线、时间和是否还是之前那种服务。
items.next_step: Ask whether this is a recheck, the usual route, and the timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: Repeat cases can route to Catcher or Followup.

items.hook: 第一次做体检先把项目和时间说清，反而更容易轻松一点。
items.bridge: 不用一上来就决定整套套餐，先把项目、人数和想约时间收窄就够了。
items.next_step: Ask for checkup type, people count if relevant, and preferred visit time.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher when basics are complete.
